---
title: "exp13_analysis_po_zmianach"
author: "Maya Śliwa"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Quarto

Quarto enables you to weave together content and executable code into a finished document. To learn more about Quarto see <https://quarto.org>.

## Running Code

When you click the **Render** button a document will be generated that includes both content and the output of embedded code. You can embed code like this:

```{r}
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(writexl)
library(dplyr)
setwd("~/Desktop/Szade_Lab/aktualne")
```

```{r}
# lista kolumn cytometrycznych 
cyto_cols <- c(
  "all_events",
  "singlets_cells",
  "Live_dead_Ly6C_subset",
  "FSC_A_medium_SSC_A_high",
  "FSC_low.SSC_low",
  "FSChigh_SSChigh",
  "FSClow_SSC_high",
  "SSC_low_FSC_high",
  "cKit_neg",
  "low6C_mono",
  "CD16_32neg_CD71hi",
  "Ter119neg_CD105pos",
  "Ter119pos_CD105pos",
  "Ter119pos_CD105neg",
  "Ter119neg_CD105neg",
  "CD16_32pos_CD71hi",
  "CD16_32neg_CD71pos",
  "CD16_32low_CD71low",
  "CD16_32neg_CD71neg",
  "monocytes_1",
  "FcR_hi",
  "FcR_low",
  "FcR_neg",
  "neutrophils",
  "non_mielo_wide",
  "Ter119_pos_CD16_32neg",
  "CD71high_Ter119neg",
  "CD71pos_Ter119low",
  "CD71pos_Ter119neg",
  "non_mielo",
  "early_baso",
  "late_baso",
  "polychrom",
  "proerythro",
  "Q1_CD150neg_CD105pos",
  "Q2_CD150pos_CD105pos",
  "Q3_CD150pos_CD105neg",
  "Q4_CD150neg_CD105neg",
  "cKit_pos",
  "CD150pos_CD16_32neg",
  "GMP_1",
  "GMP_2",
  "non_GMP",
  "CMP_1",
  "CFUE",
  "preCFUE",
  "preGM",
  "preMegE",
  "CD71pos_CD34neg",
  "CMP_1_CD71pos_CD105neg",
  "CMP_1_CD71pos_CD105pos",
  "CMP_2",
  "trombo"
)

# wczytanie danych
df <- read_excel("ERC_aim1_exp13_summary.xlsx") 

# OBIEKT R z samą cytometrią
df_cyto <- df %>%
  select(all_of(cyto_cols))

# normalizacja % of live dla wszystkich
denom <- "Live_dead_Ly6C_subset"
gate_cols <- setdiff(colnames(df_cyto), denom)

df_cyto_pct_live <- df_cyto %>%
  mutate(
    across(
      all_of(gate_cols),
      ~ ifelse(.data[[denom]] == 0 | is.na(.data[[denom]]), NA_real_, (.x / .data[[denom]]) * 100),
      .names = "{.col}_pct_live"
    )
  )

#normalizacja % of live dla zgatowanych populacji
gated_populations <- c(
  "low6C_mono",
  "monocytes_1",
  "CD16_32neg_CD71hi",
  "CD16_32pos_CD71hi",
  "CD16_32neg_CD71pos",
  "CD16_32low_CD71low",
  "CD16_32neg_CD71neg",
  "FcR_hi",
  "FcR_low",
  "FcR_neg",
  "neutrophils",
  "Ter119_pos_CD16_32neg",
  "CD71high_Ter119neg",
  "CD71pos_Ter119low",
  "CD71pos_Ter119neg",
  "early_baso",
  "late_baso",
  "polychrom",
  "proerythro",
  "Ter119neg_CD105pos",
  "Ter119pos_CD105pos",
  "Ter119pos_CD105neg",
  "Ter119neg_CD105neg",
  "Q1_CD150neg_CD105pos",
  "Q2_CD150pos_CD105pos",
  "Q3_CD150pos_CD105neg",
  "Q4_CD150neg_CD105neg",
  "CD150pos_CD16_32neg",
  "GMP_1",
  "GMP_2",
  "non_GMP",
  "CMP_1",
  "CMP_2",
  "CFUE",
  "preCFUE",
  "preGM",
  "preMegE",
  "CD71pos_CD34neg",
  "CMP_1_CD71pos_CD105neg",
  "CMP_1_CD71pos_CD105pos",
  "trombo"
)

denom <- "Live_dead_Ly6C_subset"
df_gated_pct_live <- df_cyto %>%
  mutate(
    across(
      all_of(gated_populations),
      ~ ifelse(
        .data[[denom]] == 0 | is.na(.data[[denom]]),
        NA_real_,
        (.x / .data[[denom]]) * 100
      ),
      .names = "{.col}_pct_live"
    )
  ) %>%
  select(ends_with("_pct_live"))
```

# Analiza bez log transform

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(uwot)
library(dbscan)

set.seed(123)

# 1. NA -> 0
pca_mat_no_log <- df_gated_pct_live %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), ~ replace_na(.x, 0))) %>%
  as.matrix()

# 2. PCA BEZ log-transform
pca_res_no_log <- prcomp(
  pca_mat_no_log,
  center = TRUE,
  scale. = TRUE
)

var_explained_no_log <- (pca_res_no_log$sdev^2) / sum(pca_res_no_log$sdev^2) * 100

# bierzemy pierwsze 5 PC
X_pca_no_log <- pca_res_no_log$x[, 1:5, drop = FALSE]

# 3. UMAP na PCA
umap_no_log <- umap(
  X_pca_no_log,
  n_neighbors = 10,
  min_dist = 0.2,
  metric = "euclidean"
)

umap_df_no_log <- as.data.frame(umap_no_log)
colnames(umap_df_no_log) <- c("UMAP1", "UMAP2")

# 4. DBSCAN na PCA
kNNdistplot(X_pca_no_log, k = 5)
abline(h = 0.8, col = "red", lwd = 2)

db_no_log <- dbscan(
  X_pca_no_log,
  eps = 0.8,
  minPts = 5
)

table(db_no_log$cluster)

# 5. PCA plot
pca_df_no_log <- as.data.frame(pca_res_no_log$x)
pca_df_no_log$cluster <- factor(db_no_log$cluster)

ggplot(pca_df_no_log, aes(PC1, PC2, color = cluster)) +
  geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.85) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  labs(
    title = "PCA - no log transform",
    subtitle = "NA replaced with 0, DBSCAN on PCA",
    x = paste0("PC1 (", round(var_explained_no_log[1], 1), "%)"),
    y = paste0("PC2 (", round(var_explained_no_log[2], 1), "%)"),
    color = "Cluster"
  )

# 6. UMAP plot
umap_df_no_log$cluster <- factor(db_no_log$cluster)

ggplot(umap_df_no_log, aes(UMAP1, UMAP2, color = cluster)) +
  geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.85) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  labs(
    title = "UMAP - no log transform",
    subtitle = "DBSCAN performed on PCA",
    color = "Cluster"
  )
```

# Analiza z NA zamienionyn na mean zamiast 0

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(uwot)
library(dbscan)

set.seed(123)

# 1. NA -> mean
pca_mat_mean <- df_gated_pct_live %>%
  mutate(across(
    everything(),
    ~ {
      x <- .x
      x[is.na(x)] <- mean(x, na.rm = TRUE)
      x
    }
  )) %>%
  as.matrix()

# 2. log-transform
pca_mat_mean_log <- log1p(pca_mat_mean)

# 3. PCA
pca_res_mean <- prcomp(
  pca_mat_mean_log,
  center = TRUE,
  scale. = TRUE
)

var_explained_mean <- (pca_res_mean$sdev^2) / sum(pca_res_mean$sdev^2) * 100

X_pca_mean <- pca_res_mean$x[, 1:5, drop = FALSE]

# 4. UMAP na PCA
umap_mean <- umap(
  X_pca_mean,
  n_neighbors = 10,
  min_dist = 0.2,
  metric = "euclidean"
)

umap_df_mean <- as.data.frame(umap_mean)
colnames(umap_df_mean) <- c("UMAP1", "UMAP2")

# 5. DBSCAN na PCA
kNNdistplot(X_pca_mean, k = 5)
abline(h = 0.8, col = "red", lwd = 2)

db_mean <- dbscan(
  X_pca_mean,
  eps = 0.8,
  minPts = 5
)

table(db_mean$cluster)

# 6. PCA plot
pca_df_mean <- as.data.frame(pca_res_mean$x)
pca_df_mean$cluster <- factor(db_mean$cluster)

ggplot(pca_df_mean, aes(PC1, PC2, color = cluster)) +
  geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.85) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  labs(
    title = "PCA - NA replaced with mean",
    subtitle = "log1p transform, DBSCAN on PCA",
    x = paste0("PC1 (", round(var_explained_mean[1], 1), "%)"),
    y = paste0("PC2 (", round(var_explained_mean[2], 1), "%)"),
    color = "Cluster"
  )

# 7. UMAP plot
umap_df_mean$cluster <- factor(db_mean$cluster)

ggplot(umap_df_mean, aes(UMAP1, UMAP2, color = cluster)) +
  geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.85) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  labs(
    title = "UMAP - NA replaced with mean",
    subtitle = "DBSCAN performed on PCA",
    color = "Cluster"
  )
```

# Analiza z DBSCAN na UMAP zamiast na PCA

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(uwot)
library(dbscan)

set.seed(123)

# 1. NA -> 0
pca_mat_umap_db <- df_gated_pct_live %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), ~ replace_na(.x, 0))) %>%
  as.matrix()

# 2. log-transform
pca_mat_umap_db_log <- log1p(pca_mat_umap_db)

# 3. PCA
pca_res_umap_db <- prcomp(
  pca_mat_umap_db_log,
  center = TRUE,
  scale. = TRUE
)

var_explained_umap_db <- (pca_res_umap_db$sdev^2) / sum(pca_res_umap_db$sdev^2) * 100

X_pca_umap_db <- pca_res_umap_db$x[, 1:5, drop = FALSE]

# 4. UMAP na PCA
umap_umap_db <- umap(
  X_pca_umap_db,
  n_neighbors = 10,
  min_dist = 0.2,
  metric = "euclidean"
)

umap_df_umap_db <- as.data.frame(umap_umap_db)
colnames(umap_df_umap_db) <- c("UMAP1", "UMAP2")

# 5. DBSCAN na UMAP
kNNdistplot(umap_umap_db, k = 5)
abline(h = 0.8, col = "red", lwd = 2)

db_umap_db <- dbscan(
  umap_umap_db,
  eps = 0.8,
  minPts = 5
)

table(db_umap_db$cluster)

# 6. PCA plot
pca_df_umap_db <- as.data.frame(pca_res_umap_db$x)
pca_df_umap_db$cluster <- factor(db_umap_db$cluster)

ggplot(pca_df_umap_db, aes(PC1, PC2, color = cluster)) +
  geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.85) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  labs(
    title = "PCA - DBSCAN on UMAP",
    subtitle = "log1p transform, NA replaced with 0",
    x = paste0("PC1 (", round(var_explained_umap_db[1], 1), "%)"),
    y = paste0("PC2 (", round(var_explained_umap_db[2], 1), "%)"),
    color = "Cluster"
  )

# 7. UMAP plot
umap_df_umap_db$cluster <- factor(db_umap_db$cluster)

ggplot(umap_df_umap_db, aes(UMAP1, UMAP2, color = cluster)) +
  geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.85) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  labs(
    title = "UMAP - DBSCAN on UMAP",
    subtitle = "log1p transform, NA replaced with 0",
    color = "Cluster"
  )
```

# Wszystkie 3 zmiany

-   bez log-transform

-   NA zamienione na mean zamiast 0

-    DBSCAN na UMAP zamiast na PCA

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(uwot)
library(dbscan)

set.seed(123)

# 1. NA -> mean
pca_mat_all_changes <- df_gated_pct_live %>%
  mutate(across(
    everything(),
    ~ {
      x <- .x
      x[is.na(x)] <- mean(x, na.rm = TRUE)
      x
    }
  )) %>%
  as.matrix()

# 2. PCA BEZ log-transform
pca_res_all_changes <- prcomp(
  pca_mat_all_changes,
  center = TRUE,
  scale. = TRUE
)

var_explained_all_changes <- (pca_res_all_changes$sdev^2) / sum(pca_res_all_changes$sdev^2) * 100

# bierzemy pierwsze 5 PC
X_pca_all_changes <- pca_res_all_changes$x[, 1:5, drop = FALSE]

# 3. UMAP na PCA
umap_all_changes <- umap(
  X_pca_all_changes,
  n_neighbors = 10,
  min_dist = 0.2,
  metric = "euclidean"
)

umap_df_all_changes <- as.data.frame(umap_all_changes)
colnames(umap_df_all_changes) <- c("UMAP1", "UMAP2")

# 4. DBSCAN na UMAP
kNNdistplot(umap_all_changes, k = 5)
abline(h = 0.8, col = "red", lwd = 2)

db_all_changes <- dbscan(
  umap_all_changes,
  eps = 0.8,
  minPts = 5
)

table(db_all_changes$cluster)

# 5. PCA plot
pca_df_all_changes <- as.data.frame(pca_res_all_changes$x)
pca_df_all_changes$cluster <- factor(db_all_changes$cluster)

ggplot(pca_df_all_changes, aes(PC1, PC2, color = cluster)) +
  geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.85) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  labs(
    title = "PCA - all changes applied",
    subtitle = "no log transform, NA replaced with mean, DBSCAN on UMAP",
    x = paste0("PC1 (", round(var_explained_all_changes[1], 1), "%)"),
    y = paste0("PC2 (", round(var_explained_all_changes[2], 1), "%)"),
    color = "Cluster"
  )

# 6. UMAP plot
umap_df_all_changes$cluster <- factor(db_all_changes$cluster)

ggplot(umap_df_all_changes, aes(UMAP1, UMAP2, color = cluster)) +
  geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.85) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  labs(
    title = "UMAP - all changes applied",
    subtitle = "no log transform, NA replaced with mean, DBSCAN on UMAP",
    color = "Cluster"
  )
```
